log_evidence: zsh:1: no such file or directory: .venv/bin/huggingface-cli
classifications.reasoning: The download tool was installed, but the expected executable name was wrong in this environment. Switching to the verified local hf CLI directly addresses the failure without changing the weight source or backend.

log_evidence: pip build isolation tried to download setuptools>=68.0 during bundle env-seed preparation and failed without network access
classifications.reasoning: Replay must be bundle-only. Disabling build isolation lets the env seed reuse its already-installed build tooling and avoids an external dependency during bundle preparation.
